meaning: n.(盛液体,气体的大容器)桶、箱、罐、槽,池塘,坦克,战车,柜,储水池vt.储于槽中,击败vi.大量喝酒
examples: The tank became bogged down in mud.
The tank had leaked a small amount of water.
We drove there and back on one tank of petrol.
Tritium would not be very dangerous just sitting in a tank somewhere -it would decay to very low levels of radiation in time.
Walker wasn't merely a tailback he was a 6-foot-1, 225-pound nuclear-powered tank who, in three collegiate seasons, rushed for 5, 259 yards and 49 touchdowns.
